scripts.dev: pnpm run db:up && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "pnpm --filter server run dev" "pnpm --filter client run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter server run build && pnpm --filter client run build
scripts.db:up: node scripts/require-env-file.mjs dev .dev-env .dev-env.example && docker compose --env-file .dev-env up -d --wait postgres
scripts.db:down: node scripts/require-env-file.mjs dev .dev-env .dev-env.example && docker compose --env-file .dev-env stop postgres
scripts.test: pnpm --filter server run test && pnpm --filter client run test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter server run typecheck && pnpm --filter client run typecheck
